🏅 THE ACHIEVEMENT
Pakistan Shines on the Global Stage
Pakistan brought home 4 prestigious awards — including the First Prize in Computing Track — at the largest-ever Huawei ICT Global Final, held in Shenzhen, China.
★ HIGHLIGHTS ★
◆
Pakistan won First Prize — Computing Track (Practice Competition) at Huawei ICT Competition 2025–2026 Global Final
◆
Hira Khursheed, BSCS 6th Semester, CUI Abbottabad, received the award on behalf of her mentor Dr. Farman Ullah
◆
The event drew 220,000+ participants from 100+ countries and 2,000+ universities — the largest edition in competition history
◆
Pakistani students praised China's technological ecosystem and Huawei's innovation-driven development during their Shenzhen visit
◆
Theme: "I.C. The Future" — connecting the next generation with global ICT opportunities
